Uses of Class
model.Question

Packages that use Question
Package
Description
application
 
databasePart1
 
model
The model package defines the core data structures and entities used throughout the application.
pages
The pages package contains all the JavaFX-based user interface (UI) components of the application.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    User.canMarkSolution(Question q)
    Convenience used by the UI: can this user mark an answer as solution? By default privileged users or the question author may mark as solution.
